# chat_bubbles

> Flutter package providing chat-bubble widgets (WhatsApp-style and other shapes), a message bar, typing indicators, reactions, swipe actions, and message grouping helpers. Pure Dart UI components ‚Äî no audio/image runtime dependency. Install with `flutter pub add chat_bubbles`.

All public widgets are re-exported from a single barrel file: `import 'package:chat_bubbles/chat_bubbles.dart';`

## Quick recipes

Copy-paste-ready snippets for common scenarios. Each is a complete, runnable widget.

- [docs/recipes.md](docs/recipes.md): cookbook of 8 short examples ‚Äî basic chat, reply UI, audio with waveform, image bubble, reactions, swipe-to-reply, message grouping, custom message bar

## Widget API reference

Each file's public class has dartdoc on every parameter (enforced by the `public_member_api_docs` lint). The pub.dev page renders the full reference.

- [lib/chat_bubbles.dart](lib/chat_bubbles.dart): public barrel ‚Äî every exported widget is listed here under a category header
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_normal.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_normal.dart): `BubbleNormal` ‚Äî basic text bubble with tail, timestamp, sent/delivered/seen ticks, edited/forwarded flags
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_special_one.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_special_one.dart): `BubbleSpecialOne` ‚Äî alternate bubble shape
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_special_two.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_special_two.dart): `BubbleSpecialTwo` ‚Äî alternate bubble shape
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_special_three.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_special_three.dart): `BubbleSpecialThree` ‚Äî alternate bubble shape
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_reply.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_reply.dart): `BubbleReply` ‚Äî bubble with quoted reply header (tappable to scroll to original)
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_normal_audio.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_normal_audio.dart): `BubbleNormalAudio` ‚Äî audio bubble with optional `waveformData` bar chart, scrubbing, playback-speed toggle
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_normal_image.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_normal_image.dart): `BubbleNormalImage` ‚Äî image bubble (consumer provides the `Image` widget ‚Äî Network, Asset, File, etc.)
- [lib/bubbles/bubble_link_preview.dart](lib/bubbles/bubble_link_preview.dart): `BubbleLinkPreview` ‚Äî bubble with URL preview card
- [lib/date_chips/date_chip.dart](lib/date_chips/date_chip.dart): `DateChip` ‚Äî date separator chip (Today / Yesterday / formatted date)
- [lib/message_bars/message_bar.dart](lib/message_bars/message_bar.dart): `MessageBar` ‚Äî bottom input bar with optional reply preview, actions, custom send button
- [lib/message_bars/message_bar_style.dart](lib/message_bars/message_bar_style.dart): `MessageBarStyle` (v1.10+) ‚Äî borders, padding, keyboard type, fillColor, min/maxLines for `MessageBar`
- [lib/indicators/typing_indicator.dart](lib/indicators/typing_indicator.dart): `TypingIndicator`, `TypingIndicatorWave` ‚Äî animated typing dots/wave
- [lib/reactions/bubble_reaction.dart](lib/reactions/bubble_reaction.dart): `BubbleReaction`, `Reaction`, `ReactionPicker`, `ReactionOverlay` ‚Äî emoji reactions attached to a bubble
- [lib/swipe/swipeable_bubble.dart](lib/swipe/swipeable_bubble.dart): `SwipeableBubble` ‚Äî wrap any bubble for swipe-right (reply) / swipe-left (delete)
- [lib/groups/bubble_group_builder.dart](lib/groups/bubble_group_builder.dart): `BubbleGroupBuilder` ‚Äî auto-cluster consecutive same-sender messages with shared avatar/tail
- [lib/groups/message_group_helper.dart](lib/groups/message_group_helper.dart): `MessageGroupHelper.compute`, `GroupInfo` ‚Äî derive grouping info from a flat message list

## Constraints

- Minimum SDK: Dart 3.6, Flutter 3.27
- Only runtime dependency: `intl ^0.20.1`
- Use `Color.withValues(alpha: x)`, NOT `Color.withOpacity(x)` (deprecated)

## Optional

- [example/lib/main.dart](example/lib/main.dart): runnable demo app showing every widget
- [README.md](README.md): installation + the most common widget usage
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): per-version change list (DD/MM/YYYY format)
